visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with brown hair, wearing a black t-shirt, stands in a brightly lit indoor hallway. She talks directly to the camera with an expressive face, gesturing with her hands. (2) She holds up a black package of instant noodles to the camera, looking excited. The camera remains at eye-level. (3) The scene shifts to a kitchen setting. A hand is seen placing a block of instant noodles into boiling water in a black pan. Then, milk is poured into the pan, followed by a handful of shredded white cheese. (4) The noodles are stirred with chopsticks, showing a creamy orange sauce and melted cheese. (5) The setting changes to a living room with a white sofa. The woman is seated on the floor or a low table, eating the noodles and fried chicken from a cardboard box. She uses chopsticks to lift long strands of noodles and dips a piece of fried chicken into a small cup of white sauce. (6) She continues eating enthusiastically, showing close-ups of her chewing and swallowing. Finally, she is shown taking a bite of a dark chocolate cake.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我在台灣. [Logo]: 🇹🇼. (2) [Subtitle]: 體檢. (3) [Subtitle]: (前兩天只吃粥的人). (4) [Subtitle]: 今天我要吃好吃的 就是. (5) [Subtitle]: 火辣雞麵 불닭볶음면. (6) [Slogan]: 炸雞已訂完. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為今天要開豬豬派對. (8) [Subtitle]: 要做奶油版的火辣雞炒麵. (9) [Variety]: 起司瀑布. (10) [Subtitle]: (炸雞準備完). (11) [Subtitle]: 如果韓國朋友心情看起來不太好? 那就煮一個火辣雞麵給她吃. (12) [Subtitle]: 完全不辣. (13) [Subtitle]: 我覺得如果再辣一點會更完美. (14) [Variety]: 起司調味的炸雞. (15) [Subtitle]: 一定要配優格醬一起吃!. (16) [Subtitle]: 我是用原味優格加一點蜂蜜自己調的. (17) [Subtitle]: 為了做內視鏡 連續兩天都只能吃白粥跟白饅頭. (18) [Subtitle]: 人真的要瘋掉了... 🥣. (19) [Subtitle]: 你們知道這部分最好吃嗎?!. (20) [Subtitle]: 正在追《模範計程車3》 最近太忙都沒什麼發 Reels. (21) [Subtitle]: 不過我下週要去日本! 🇯🇵 到時候會努力多拍一點給大家看✨. (22) [Subtitle]: 健康檢查真的 做不了第二次了 😫

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking and eating.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with brown hair tied back, wearing a simple black t-shirt and makeup including red lipstick.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor apartment featuring a hallway, a kitchen with white cabinetry and a black pan, and a living room area with a light-colored sofa and a small orange plush toy in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately with a female voice speaking energetically in Mandarin. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect accompanies a transition as the speaker's tone remains high-pitched and excited. (3) Sound of liquid pouring is heard, followed by a bubbling, sizzling sound as the music continues in the background. (4) The sound of plastic rustling occurs briefly. (5) Prominent slurping sounds and wet mouth noises (eating sounds) become the primary focus, while the music stays at a consistent volume. (6) A distinct 'ding' sound effect triggers as the speaker continues her energetic narration over the eating sounds. (7) Crunching sounds of food being bitten into are heard clearly. (8) The music loops as the female voice finishes with a high-pitched exclamation and a final chewing sound.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a personal 'cheat meal' experience following a restrictive diet for a medical check-up, showcasing the preparation and enjoyment of creamy Buldak ramen and fried chicken to entertain and engage food enthusiasts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator prominently displays the Samyang Buldak Ramen packaging and focuses heavily on the brand's signature product throughout the eating sequence.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of visual and auditory stimuli (fast cuts, text overlays, eating SFX) common in short-form social media vlogs to maintain high engagement.
